response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack web developer whose primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which align with the core requirements of this role. His C++ exposure is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, falling drastically short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. He has no discernible Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain knowledge, and his SQL experience appears surface-level with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle. The brief stint at RIDE Capital involved a JavaScript/TypeScript stack and does not constitute capital markets domain expertise in any meaningful sense.
strengths: Strong CI/CD, DevOps, and developer-tooling background across multiple roles
Demonstrated experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Consistent track record of communication, knowledge-sharing, and technical leadership (workshops, talks, open-source)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months at NI + thesis project) versus the required 5–10 years of hands-on production C++ on Windows
Zero Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Capital Markets domain knowledge present in the resume
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency, no Windows-platform development, and no mention of Summit, STL, Python, Kafka, or MQ
